message:
refactor(orchestration): remove unused repo_index increment

Since prefetch_next_repos now always uses index 0 (pending_repos
shrinks from front as repos start), the repo_index tracking is no
longer needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9689,7 +9689,6 @@ run_review_orchestration() {
         while can_start_new_session "${#active_sessions[@]}" && [[ ${#pending_repos[@]} -gt 0 ]]; do
             if start_next_queued_session active_sessions pending_repos repo_items; then
                 increment_repos_processed
-                ((repo_index++))
             else
                 break
             fi
